title: fermented dense croatian risotto gratin
description: a dense, rich, and creamy croatian risotto dish with a tangy fermented twist, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
add the arborio rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
add the water, 1 cup at a time, stirring continuously and allowing each portion to absorb before adding the next.
cook for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender and creamy.
stir in the vegan parmesan cheese, thyme, and parsley.
transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional vegan parmesan cheese if desired.
bake in a preheated oven at 375f for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the risotto is heated through.
remove from the oven and stir in the lime juice.
garnish with additional fresh parsley if desired.
